title: aster polyglossus var. microglossus
intro: Aster polyglossus var. microglossus, also known as the small-lipped white aster, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Aster polyglossus var. microglossus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant is typically harvested for its leaves and flowers, which can be made into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
